title: What humility actually looks like — it's not what you think
caption:
Humble isn't small. It isn't shrinking or performing softness to make the room comfortable.

Humility is a theology: I am not the main character. God is. And the man who knows that stops needing the room to confirm who he is.

He knows his weight — he just doesn't throw it at everyone who tests him. That's the self-command Christ had standing before Pilate.

The real test isn't the spotlight. It's the man nobody else is paying attention to. How you treat him is how humble you actually are.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6

Share this with a brother who confuses humility with weakness.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #humility #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #micah68
